strings.settings.title: Ngaahi Seting
strings.settings.subtitle: Ngaahi Filifiliga ʻo e Polokalama
strings.lang.title: Lea
strings.lang.intro: Kuo ʻosi ʻai ngaahi lea ʻe niʻihi. Hilifaki ho lea ki hano fakatonulea kakato ʻo taimi kotoa — ngaahi fakamatala, ngaahi talaʻofakaholo mo ha ngaahi meʻa kehe.
strings.lang.failed: Naʻe hala ʻa e hilifaki. Sivi ho fetuʻutaki ʻo ngāue foki.
strings.settings.units.desc: Ko e founga ʻe fakaʻasi ai ngaahi mamao.
strings.settings.night.desc: Ko e kulokulo loloto ʻoku malu ai ngaahi mata kuo maʻu ʻe e poʻuli — ko e maama kulokulo ʻoku siʻi ʻene ʻaofaki ki he sio pogipogi, ʻo kei maka-maka ʻa e langi ʻi he sio hake.
strings.settings.night.auto.desc: ʻOku kulokulo fakaʻotometi ʻi he poʻuli langi hili ʻa e hifo ʻa e laʻā.
strings.settings.location.desc: Ko e feituʻu ʻe fakaʻehiʻehi ai ʻa e langi.
strings.settings.haptics.desc: Ngaokingaoki ʻi he maʻu konga ki he ngāue.
strings.settings.speech.desc: Lau ʻiate ia ʻa e ngāue mo ngaahi fakahinohino — maʻa e ngāue nima-tukuange mo e kakai ʻoku visually impaired.
strings.settings.fov.desc: Fakaleleiʻi vaivai ke fakafenapasi ngaahi laine fakaʻilonga fetuʻu mo e ngaahi hala satelaiti ki he langi moʻoni.
strings.settings.about.credits: Ngāue ʻaki ʻa e astronomy-engine, satellite.js & Celestrak.
strings.pro.title: Planet Pointer Pro
strings.pro.codePlaceholder: ʻOku ʻi ai hoʻo kōti fakaʻata?
strings.pro.badCode: Naʻe ʻikai ngāue ʻa e kōti ko ʻeni.
strings.paywall.title: Fakaʻata ʻa e Langi Kotoa
strings.paywall.subtitle: Ko ha fakatau pe taha. ʻOhake ha fakatotongi māhina pe tokonaki — ʻoʻou ʻi he taimi kotoa, katoa ʻi ʻolunga.
strings.paywall.feature.catalog: Ngaahi fetuʻu, fakaʻilonga fetuʻu mo e satelaiti kotoa
strings.paywall.feature.timeMachine: Mīsini Taimi — sio ki he langi ʻi ha ʻaho fifili
strings.paywall.feature.events: Ngaahi hoko ʻi he langi — fakapouli, ʻuha fetuʻu, fakataha
strings.paywall.codePrompt: ʻOku ʻi ai hoʻo kōti fakaʻata?
strings.paywall.maybeLater: Mahalo ʻi muʻa ʻi ha taimi
strings.paywall.comingSoon: ʻE ʻata ngaahi fakatau talu mai — ngāue ʻaki ha kōti fakaʻata he taimi ni.
strings.paywall.error: ʻOku hā ha meʻa hala. Feinga foki.
strings.paywall.restoreNone: ʻOku ʻikai maʻu ha fakatau kimuʻa.
strings.planets.title: Planet Pointer
strings.planets.subtitle: Fili ha ngāue ke kumi ʻi he langi
strings.stars.title: Ngaahi Fetuʻu
strings.stars.subtitle: Ngaahi fetuʻu hingoa {n} ʻoku maama taha

strings.deepsky.subtitle: Fetuʻu {n}, ngaahi ʻuʻupeʻe, ngaahi kalakasi mo e ngaahi kulupu
strings.constellations.title: Ngaahi Fakaʻilonga Fetuʻu
strings.constellations.subtitle: Ngaahi fakaʻilonga fetuʻu {n} ʻoku talaʻofa
strings.satellites.title: Ngaahi Satelaiti
strings.events.title: Ngaahi Hoko ʻi he Langi
strings.events.subtitle: Ko e meʻa ʻoku hoko mai — emiemu ki he taimi fifili
strings.events.calculating: ʻOku fakaʻehiʻehi ngaahi hoko ʻoku muʻomuʻa…
strings.search.name: Kumi ʻaki ʻa e hingoa…
strings.list.empty.planetsFav: ʻOhake ha meʻa lelei — Ufiufi ha meʻa ʻo emiemu ★ ke tānaki.
strings.list.empty.visible: ʻOku ʻikai ha meʻa ʻi ʻolunga ʻo e horizon he taimi ni — Feinga "Fakaʻasi kotoa".
strings.list.empty.search: ʻOku ʻikai ha meʻa ʻo fetauʻaki mo ho kumi.
strings.list.empty.starsVisible: ʻOku ʻikai ha ngaahi fetuʻu ʻi he lisi ʻi ʻolunga ʻo e horizon he taimi ni.
strings.list.empty.deepskyVisible: ʻOku ʻikai ha ngaahi meʻa langi hōhonu ʻi ʻolunga ʻo e horizon he taimi ni.
strings.list.empty.constellationsVisible: ʻOku ʻikai ha taha ʻo e ngaahi fakaʻilonga fetuʻu ni ʻi ʻolunga ʻo e horizon he taimi ni.
strings.sat.overhead: ● Hā he taimi ni — Sio Hake!
strings.sat.overheadDay: ʻOku ʻi ʻolunga he taimi ni ka ʻoku maama
strings.sat.overheadShadow: ʻOku ʻi ʻolunga he taimi ni ka ʻoku ʻi he tuiʻa ʻo Maamalangi
strings.sat.noPass: ʻOku ʻikai ha tuʻu ʻe hā talu mai ni
strings.fav.empty:
ʻOhake ha ngaahi meʻa lelei.
Ufiufi ha palaneeti pe fetuʻu ʻo emiemu ★.
strings.fav.belowNow: ʻOku ʻikai ha taha ʻo ho ngaahi meʻa lelei ʻi ʻolunga ʻo e horizon he taimi ni.
strings.fav.noMatch: ʻOku ʻikai ha meʻa lelei ʻo fetauʻaki mo ho kumi.
strings.point.belowBanner: {name} ʻi lalo ʻo e horizon — Ngāue ʻi lalo ʻo Maamalangi.
strings.point.satBelowBanner: {name} ʻoku ʻikai ʻi ʻolunga he taimi ni — Emiemu fakamatala ki he tuʻu ʻe hoko atu.
strings.point.timeTravel: 🕰️ Fononga Taimi: {when} — Emiemu ke foki ki he taimi ni
strings.point.permBody: ʻOku fakaʻasi ʻe Planet Pointer ha ngāhau tokanga ʻi ʻolunga ʻo e vitio kamela moʻui ke fakaʻilonga ʻi {name}.
strings.info.passNote: Taimi fakaʻapi. Teitei lahi = mahino, faingofua ke tuʻu.
strings.ev.lunarSub: ʻOku ne ʻalu ʻa e Māhina ʻi loto ʻo e tuiʻa ʻo Maamalangi
strings.ev.solarSub: ʻOku ne ʻalu ʻa e Māhina ʻi ʻolunga ʻo e Laʻā
strings.time.title: Mīsini Taimi
strings.time.subtitle: Sio ki he langi ʻi ha ʻaho pe taimi fifili.
